snippet.title: Sabudana | Web Series | Official Trailer | This Eid | Doogs Life
snippet.description:
Sabudana | Web Series | Official Trailer | This Eid | Doogs Life

A Web Series by Doogs Life
A Story. A Vision. A New Era.

This Eid, a YouTube web-series that blends comedy, thrill, and reality like never before.
Set in the heart of Karachi, Sabudana dives into the city’s raw energy, street-smart humor, and unspoken truths.
At its core is a middle-class struggling artist — chasing dreams in a city where survival comes before passion.
As opportunities turn into shortcuts and jokes turn into risks, the line between hustle and scam begins to blur.
How far can a man go to earn money?
And what does it really cost to survive in Karachi?
Real characters. Real struggles. Real Karachi.
This is not just a series — it’s the beginning of a new era of YouTube storytelling.

Coming this Eid. Only on YouTube.

snippet.title: Aayat Arif || Ramadan Ki Kya Baat Hai || Ramadan Special 2026 || Official video
snippet.description:
#aayatarif  #ramadan  #ramadankikyabaathai

🌙 Assalam-O-Alaikum Wa Rahmatullahi Wa Barakatuh! 🌙

RAMADAN MUBARAK TO YOU AND YOUR FAMILY! ✨

A very special hello to everyone watching! As the moon is sighted and the holy month begins, our hearts fill with peace. To celebrate this blessing, I am so happy to present my brand new Kalam, "Ramdan Ki Kya Baat Hai."

This month isn't just about staying hungry or thirsty; it’s about feeling the love of Allah. It’s about sharing, caring, and fixing our hearts. This little nasheed is my humble attempt to capture that beautiful feeling—the peace of Sehri, the blessing of Iftar, and the sweetness of Taraweeh.

🎧 In this soulful voice of Aayat Arif, listen to what makes Ramadan so special! 🎧

May this Ramadan be a month of forgiveness, blessings, and happiness for you. May your fasts be easy, your prayers be accepted, and your home be filled with Noor.

👇 Spread the Blessing!
If this nasheed touches your heart, please LIKE the video and SHARE it with your friends and family. Let’s fill everyone’s feed with the spirit of Ramadan!

snippet.title: Untitled John Wick Game - Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
snippet.description:
Created in collaboration between Saber, Lionsgate, and franchise director Chad Stahelski, the new “Untitled John Wick Game” will feature an original script set in the John Wick timeline, expanding on the franchise’s intricate lore with familiar characters fans already know, as well as completely new ones. Saber’s design will be faithful to the unique style and signature elements of the series, including a distinct gun fu combat system, jaw-dropping camerawork, immersive driving experiences, and a variety of memorable environments, all crafted to make players feel like they are in a John Wick movie, playing the role of John Wick himself.

#ps5 #ps5games #stateofplay #johnwick
